# Docs Templates

Copy the relevant scaffold, replace every placeholder, and remove unused sections. Do not turn the template itself into a real artifact.

## Rules

- Copy `story.md` into `docs/tasks/<slug>.md`.
- Copy `spec.md` into `docs/specs/<slug>.md`.
- Keep the spec order `Goal -> Design -> Requirements -> Tasks`; pipeline agents parse that contract.
- Keep templates generic and readable as plain Markdown.
